samples.gvd:
module accu(
    input clk,
    input rst_n,
    input [7:0] data_in,
    input valid_in,
    output valid_out,
    output [9:0] data_out
);
endmodule
samples.xml_description:
<module id="accu">
    <description>Accumulate 4 input data and output the result.</description>
    <ports>
        <input id="clk">Clock input for synchronization.</input>
        <input id="rst_n">Active-low reset signal.</input>
        <input id="data_in" width_description="[7:0]">8-bit input data for addition.</input>
        <input id="valid_in">Input signal indicating readiness for new data.</input>
        <output id="valid_out">Output signal indicating when 4 input data accumulation is reached.</output>
        <output id="data_out" width_description="[9:0]">10-bit output data representing the accumulated sum.</output>
    </ports>
    <parameter_description>
        <enum id="state" width_description="[1:0]">
            <enum-value id="idle" value="0">Idle state, waiting for valid_in.</enum-value>
            <enum-value id="accumulate" value="1">Accumulate state, ready to receive data_in.</enum-value>
        </enum>
    </parameter_description>
    <logic_description>
        <reg id="valid_out_reg" type="sequential_logic">A register to store the valid_out value.</reg>
        <reg id="data_out_reg" width_description="[9:0]" type="sequential_logic">A register to store the data_out value.</reg>
        <reg id="state_reg" width_description="[1:0]" type="sequential_logic">A register to store the state value.</reg>
        <reg id="count_reg" width_description="[1:0]" type="sequential_logic">A register to store the count value.</reg>
        <reg id="sum_reg" width_description="[9:0]" type="sequential_logic">A register to store the sum value.</reg>
    </logic_description>
    <implementation>
        <parallel>
            <if>
                <condition>
                    <or>
                        <equal><input_ref id="clk"/></equal>
                        <equal><input_ref id="rst_n"/></equal>
                    </or>
                </condition>
                <then>
                    <assign><reg_ref id="valid_out_reg"/> = 0;</assign>
                    <assign><reg_ref id="data_out_reg"/> = 10'b0000000000;</assign>
                    <assign><reg_ref id="state_reg"/> = <enum-ref id="state" value="idle"/></assign>
                    <assign><reg_ref id="count_reg"/> = 0;</assign>
                    <assign><reg_ref id="sum_reg"/> = 10'b0000000000;</assign>
                </then>
            </if>
            <if>
                <condition>
                    <and>
                        <not><reg_ref id="valid_out_reg"/></not>
                        <equal><input_ref id="valid_in"/> to 1</equal>
                    </and>
                </condition>
                <then>
                    <assign><reg_ref id="state_reg"/> = <enum-ref id="state" value="accumulate"/></assign>
                </then>
            </if>
            <if>
                <condition>
                    <and>
                        <equal><reg_ref id="state_reg"/> to <enum-ref id="state" value="accumulate"/></equal>
                        <equal><input_ref id="valid_in"/> to 1</equal>
                    </and>
                </condition>
                <then>
                    <assign><reg_ref id="count_reg"/> = <reg_ref id="count_reg"/> + 1;</assign>
                    <assign><reg_ref id="sum_reg"/> = <reg_ref id="sum_reg"/> + <input_ref id="data_in"/>;</assign>
                    <assign><output_ref id="data_out_reg"/> = <reg_ref id="sum_reg"/></assign>
                    <if>
                        <condition>
                            <equal><reg_ref id="count_reg"/> to 3</equal>
                        </condition>
                        <then>
                            <assign><output_ref id="valid_out_reg"/> = 1;</assign>
                            <assign><reg_ref id="count_reg"/> = 0;</assign>
                            <assign><reg_ref id="sum_reg"/> = 10'b0000000000;</assign>
                            <assign><reg_ref id="state_reg"/> = <enum-ref id="state" value="idle"/></assign>
                        </then>
                        <else>
                            <assign><output_ref id="valid_out_reg"/> = 0;</assign>
                        </else>
                    </if>
                </then>
            </if>
        </parallel>
    </implementation>
</module>
